title: Regional FP&A Consolidation
audience: Regional CFO, FP&A leadership, country finance controllers

pages.purpose: Regional KPI status, trend, variance bridge, and action list.
Country/entity P&L matrix, margin heatmap, and detail rows.
Currency exposure, local-to-reporting impacts, and elimination control.
Business unit performance, growth vs margin, and driver table.
Exception monitoring by severity, owner, status, and value.
CFO narrative view combining bridge, target pacing, treemap, risk funnel, and board-pack extract.
